title: Demosthenesia spectabilis
taxonomy: Demosthenesia spectabilis is a genus of flowering plants in the family Ericaceae. This genus contains only one known species, D. spectabilis, which is native to the Hawaiian Islands. The classification of D. spectabilis places it within the clade of flowering plants, and more specifically within the subclade of angiosperms. It belongs to the order Ericales, which also includes heath and heather species. As a member of the Ericaceae family, D. spectabilis is closely related to other heath species found in various parts of the world.
